description: Egeszítsd ki a mondatokat a zárójelben lévo helyes névmással vagy birtokos melléknévvel.

items.sentence: I have a new phone. This is ______ phone.

Welcome to ______ house!

I don't have my phone. Can I use ______ phone?
Look at ______! They are playing football.
